chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr. Appeal No.S-179 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of MA-8242 of 2020. 27.11.2020. Mr. Zubair Ahmed, Advocate for appellants. Ms. Rameshan Oad, Assistant Prosecutor General Sindh. ==== The appellants are convicted and sentenced to undergo R.I for one year with fine of Rs.200,000/-each and in case of default to undergo Simple imprisonment for three months by learned Additional Sessions Judge-I, Tando Muhammad Khan vide judgment dated 11th day of November 2020, which is impugned by the appellants before this Court. It has been admitted to regular hearing. In the meanwhile, the appellants have sought for suspension of the operation of the impugned judgment by way of listed application, which is not opposed by the learned A.P.G for the State. The conviction / sentence awarded to the appellants is short one and hearing of the appeal is likely to take time therefore, the operation of impugned judgment is suspended. Consequently, the appellants are ordered to be released on bail subject to furnishing surety in sum of Rs.30,000/-each and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. The listed application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE. Ahmed/Pa
